lineCook.title: Part-Time Line Cook
lineCook.summary: We are looking for a Line Cook to play a key role in preparing and executing dishes to order in our fast-paced kitchen. We are looking for someone to work 20 - 32 hours a week.

wineBarServer.title: Wine Bar Server (Flex-Time)
wineBarServer.summary: We are looking for talented hospitality professionals to join our team as part-time Wine Bar Servers. This role is perfect for those with flexibility to pick up shifts as needed ranging from 10–15 hours a week.

cookServer.title: Cook / Server (Flex-Time)
cookServer.summary:
We are seeking a dynamic and adaptable individual to join our team in a unique Flextime Front-of-House/Back-of-House Role. 
This flexible position offers the opportunity to contribute to our vibrant wine bar in various capacities, primarily supporting our events as a server and filling in as a line cook when needed.
